temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair and a goatee, wearing a dark suit jacket. The background is dark and indistinct, with a cool, blueish light illuminating him from the side. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio opens with a low, ambient, and slightly tense musical score that creates a mood of suspense and seriousness. He holds a white cigarette to his lips, and a plume of smoke drifts across his face. He has a serious, contemplative expression as he looks slightly off-camera. The camera remains steady, capturing the intimate and somber mood of the scene. The man lowers the cigarette, his gaze still fixed and intense. He brings his hand, which has a ring on the ring finger, closer to his face, still holding the cigarette near his mouth. The smoke continues to swirl around him. The shot remains a tight close-up, emphasizing his focused and slightly weary demeanor. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the man's hand as he brings the cigarette away from his mouth. The smoke dissipates, revealing more of his face and the dark, moody lighting. The "风行网" text is still present in the corner. The scene cuts to a close-up of the man's hands. He is now holding an open, silver flip phone. The phone's keypad and screen are visible. The man's fingers are poised over the keypad, ready to press a button. The background remains dark and out of focus. The white text "风行网" is still visible in the top left corner. The shot is tight on the hands and the phone, highlighting the action of dialing. The scene is quiet, with no dialogue or significant sound effects, allowing the atmospheric music to build a sense of anticipation.
